commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the gateway operator approval runtime token helper to prefer the shared exec-approvals socket token when present and adds regression coverage for shared-token, late-token, and fallback behavior.

PR surface: Source +10, Tests +102. Total +112 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main uses a module-local random runtime token while gateway trust requires the same token, so separate runtime clients cannot share it through exec-approvals config. I did not run a live failing Discord repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is appropriate because I found no concrete patch defect; the remaining action is maintainer/security acceptance of the approval-runtime credential boundary.
